description: Pipedrive is a sales pipeline management CRM designed to help small and medium businesses manage their sales processes.
self_serve: Yes, free trial and self-serve sign-up
api_surface: REST API with endpoints for deals, contacts, activities, etc.; Webhooks; SDKs in multiple languages
buildability: Good – comprehensive REST API, SDKs, clear documentation, and webhook support
main_blocker: Rate limiting (100 requests per second per user) and limited webhook event types may hinder high‑volume integrations
